offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week, lack of timely updates causes increased workload. We generate weekly insurance claims status summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Lack of timely updates on claims status leads to delayed responses and increased workload.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try weekly summary generation and email notifications for updates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
